articles.title: Heatwave alert for seven Telangana districts, thunderstorm forecast in 10 districts on June 16 - The Hindu
articles.full_text:
The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a heatwave alert for seven Telangana districts for Tuesday (June 16, 2026)
According to IMDs latest bulletin, heatwave conditions are very likely to prevail at isolated pockets in Adilabad, Kumaram Bheem Asifabad, Mancherial, Nirmal, Nizamabad, Peddapalli and Jayashankar Bhupalpally districts.
Thunderstorms forecast in 10 districts
Additionally, thunderstorms accompanied with lightning and gusty winds are very likely to occur at isolated places in Mulugu, Bhadradri Kothagudem, Khammam, Nalgonda, Suryapet, Mahabunagar, Nagarkurnool, Wanaparthy, Narayanpet and Jogulamba Gadwal districts.
Hyderabad weather forecast
Hyderabad city and its surrounding areas for the next 24 hours will see a partly cloudy sky. “Light rain or thundershowers accompanied with gusty winds are very likely to occur in parts of the city towards evening or night. The maximum and minimum temperatures are very likely to be around 37℃ and 26℃ respectively,” as per the bulletin.
Published - June 15, 2026 04:21 pm IST
